note: V11 Phase 2 ACTIVATION HEIGHT SET (C10) — V11_PHASE2_HEIGHT changed from INT64_MAX to 10000 in include/sost/params.h. Phase 2 activates at block 10,000 (~3 weeks at the 600s target from current tip ~6931). What changes at 10,000: (1) SbPoW becomes mandatory — block headers must carry miner_pubkey + BIP-340 Schnorr signature; (2) PoP lottery activates — on triggered blocks the FULL protocol-side allocation (Gold 25% + PoPC 25% = 50% of block reward) is redirected to one eligible winner, the PoW miner's 50% is never touched; (3) coinbase shape becomes variable (3/1/2 outputs for non-triggered/UPDATE/PAYOUT); (4) lottery frequency 2-of-3 for blocks 10000-14999 then 1-of-3 permanently from 15000. What does NOT change: Phase 1 rules (block 7000), total emission per block, PoW miner share, constitutional addresses. Caveat: lottery improves redistribution but is NOT Sybil-proof (cap=5 chosen by C9 Monte Carlo). MINERS MUST UPDATE node + miner binaries before block 10,000 — pre-Phase-2 binaries produce 50/25/25 coinbase on triggered blocks and the validator rejects them with CB11_LOTTERY_SHAPE. See docs/V11_PHASE2_RELEASE_NOTES.md. Tests: ON build 38/42 ctest (4 pre-existing failures), 12/12 targeted Phase 2 tests PASS. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
